title: Daoist Canon: Zhuangzi (Guo Xiang commentary) (Section 6)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Zhuangzi (Guo Xiang commentary)
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Zhuangzi (Guo Xiang commentary)

translation.text: From the Zhuangzi (Guo Xiang commentary) of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
